slides.title:
Build Your Own MCP Server
in TypeScript from Scratch
slides.subtitle: Ship AI-ready tool servers in under 100 lines

slides.codeTextAbove:
# 1. Bootstrap the Server
• Import **McpServer** and a transport
• Create an instance with `name` and `version`
• Connect via **stdio** transport

slides.title: How MCP Works
slides.body:
• Client sends **JSON-RPC** requests
• Server exposes **tools** and **resources**
• Transport handles the I/O layer
• Schema validates every call

slides.codeTextAbove:
# 2. Register a Tool
• Define a tool with `server.tool()`
• Use **Zod** schemas for input validation
• Return structured `content` arrays

slides.title: Best Practices
slides.body:
• Validate inputs with **Zod** schemas
• Return clear `error` messages
• Keep tools **small** and focused
• Add descriptions for discoverability

slides.title:
